'''hafate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:nearly|nearly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-f-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nearly|nearly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| hafate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:hafate|hafate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hafatesher|hafatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafatesherĂ«m|hafatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hafatero|hafatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hafateshĂ«|hafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafateshĂ«m|hafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihafatero|gokihafatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihafateshĂ«|gokihafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihafateshĂ«m|gokihafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohafankerom|gohafankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohafankeshĂ«|gohafankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohafankeshĂ«m|gohafankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohafankeya|gohafankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hafaterom|hafaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafatemu|hafatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hafateya|hafateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihafaterom|gokihafaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihafatemu|gokihafatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihafateya|gokihafateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:hafafate|hafafate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hafafatesher|hafafatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafafatesherĂ«m|hafafatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hafafatero|hafafatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hafafateshĂ«|hafafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafafateshĂ«m|hafafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihafafatero|gokihafafatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihafafateshĂ«|gokihafafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihafafateshĂ«m|gokihafafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohafafankerom|gohafafankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohafafankeshĂ«|gohafafankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohafafankeshĂ«m|gohafafankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohafafankeya|gohafafankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hafafaterom|hafafaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafafatemu|hafafatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hafafateya|hafafateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihafafaterom|gokihafafaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihafafatemu|gokihafafatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihafafateya|gokihafafateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:hĂŠfĂŠte|hĂŠfĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hĂŠfĂŠtesher|hĂŠfĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hĂŠfĂŠtesherĂ«m|hĂŠfĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hĂŠfĂŠtero|hĂŠfĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«|hĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m|hĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihĂŠfĂŠtero|gokihĂŠfĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«|gokihĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m|gokihĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohĂŠfĂŠnkerom|gohĂŠfĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«|gohĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gohĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hĂŠfĂŠtemu|hĂŠfĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hĂŠfĂŠteya|hĂŠfĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihĂŠfĂŠterom|gokihĂŠfĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihĂŠfĂŠtemu|gokihĂŠfĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihĂŠfĂŠteya|gokihĂŠfĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:hafafte|hafafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hafaftesher|hafaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafaftesherĂ«m|hafaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hafaftero|hafaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hafafteshĂ«|hafafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafafteshĂ«m|hafafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihafaftero|gokihafaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihafafteshĂ«|gokihafafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihafafteshĂ«m|gokihafafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohafafnkerom|gohafafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohafafnkeshĂ«|gohafafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohafafnkeshĂ«m|gohafafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohafafnkeya|gohafafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hafafterom|hafafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafaftemu|hafaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hafafteya|hafafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihafafterom|gokihafafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihafaftemu|gokihafaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihafafteya|gokihafafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
